segments.text: Your kids feet grow fast. You buy expensive shoes and three months later they are tight. Total waste of money.
But these two friends in India fixed those forever. Meet Ato. While big brands want you to keep buying new pairs, this brand built a shoe that
grows with your child. One single pair covers three full sizes. But wait, shoes are made of rubber and rubber is hard.
If you force it to stretch, it usually cracks or hurt the feet. So they invented the blooming soul. Just look at these grooves. When the foot grows, the
sole opens up naturally like a blooming flower. And they paired it with 3D knit fabric, [music] so it stretches perfectly without tearing. But usually
these functional shoes look like a medical equipment. I thought they would look weird, too. But when I saw these in real life recently, I was shocked. They
were actually looking stylish and premium. That is why 20,000 parents have already switched to it. If you want to see more amazing designs, subscribe.
